name: Computer
description: macOS desktop automation via cua-driver. Registers a computer tool that lets any agent harness control apps, capture screenshots, click, type, and inspect UI via the Accessibility tree.

cuaDriverPath.description: Path to the cua-driver binary. Defaults to cua-driver on PATH.

cuaDriverPath.label: cua-driver path
cuaDriverPath.help: Override the cua-driver binary path. Leave unset to use cua-driver from PATH.
